children.name: The industry charges you for every move you make.
children.characters: The industry charges you for every move you make.

children.name: The travel industry runs on outdated infrastructur
children.characters: The travel industry runs on outdated infrastructure that holds you back

children.name: Agents switch multiple platforms just to quote one
children.characters: Agents juggle multiple travel platforms just to quote one fare.

children.name: Your team wastes hours toggling between systems, l
children.characters: Your team wastes hours toggling between Sabre, Amadeus and Travelport, losing deals while competitors quote instantly.

children.name: Agencies pay heavily for tools they do not own whi
children.characters: Agencies pay heavily for 3rd party tools they'll never own.

children.name: Every transaction enriches their platform, not you
children.characters: Every booking enriches the platform, not you. Rising per-segment fees and IATA overhead eat your margin on every ticket.

children.name: Conflicts between GDSs and airlines shut you down
children.characters: GDS–airline content wars ground your business operations.

children.name: Content wars and policy changes turn into your cri
children.characters: Policy disputes and NDC content blackouts turn into your crisis. Your bookings disappear when others fight.

children.name: The model is broken on purpose.
children.characters: The model is broken on purpose.
